delete.done: All your data has been deleted. /start to begin again.

errors.analyzeFailed: Couldn't read that 🤔 send the photo again.
errors.correctionFailed: Couldn't apply that correction — try phrasing it differently.
errors.dailyCap: You've hit today's photo limit — come back tomorrow.
errors.globalCap: The shared demo bot has hit today's analysis limit — it runs on one person's API budget. Try again tomorrow, or run your own instance: https://github.com/kirmalyshev/eait
errors.notAnImage: That's not an image 🤔 send a photo of the meal.
errors.fileTooBig: That file is too big for me to fetch — send it as a photo instead.

help.body:
Send me a photo of your meal. I estimate the items, calories and macros, judge them against your goal, and add them to today's running total.

Got it wrong? Reply directly to my message about that meal with a correction — for example "two pieces, no oil" — and I'll redo the estimate.

Commands:
/me — today's totals
/settings — change your goal, restrictions or language
/help — this message
/delete — erase all your data

Estimates from a photo are approximate and are not medical advice.

meal.correctionHint: ↩️ Not right? Reply to this message with a correction.

onboarding.consent:
Hi! I analyse photos of your food and count calories and macros against your goal.

What you should know:
• I process food photos and your profile (goal, restrictions).
• Restrictions can include health conditions (kidneys, cholesterol). You never have to give one — tap Skip.
• Estimates are approximate — this is not medical advice.
• Photos are not stored: I analyse them and delete them immediately.
• Photos and your profile are sent to an AI provider to produce the estimate.
• /delete erases all your data and withdraws this consent.
• Full policy: https://github.com/kirmalyshev/eait/blob/main/docs/PRIVACY.md

Do you agree to this data being processed?
onboarding.decline: Without consent I can't process your data. Send /start when you're ready.
onboarding.askRestrictions: Any health or dietary restrictions? Write freely (for example: "kidneys, no sugar") or tap "Skip".
onboarding.done: All set — send me photos of your food 📸
onboarding.alreadyActive: You're already set up — just send photos of your food 📸 (/me — profile and today's totals).
onboarding.nudge: Tap a button above, or send /start.

settings.title: Settings
settings.askRestrictions: Tap a restriction to switch it on or off:
